## 📝 Deskripsi / Description

Jelaskan perubahan yang dilakukan dalam PR ini:

## 🎯 Jenis Perubahan / Type of Change

Pilih tipe perubahan yang relevan:

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (solves issue #\_\_\_)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (closes #\_\_\_)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔒 Security enhancement
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Adding tests
- [ ] 🔧 Chore/maintenance

## 🔗 Related Issues / Issue Terkait

Hubungkan dengan issue yang relevan:

- Closes #(issue number)
- Related to #(issue number)

## 📋 Perubahan yang Dilakukan / Changes Made

Daftar perubahan spesifik:

- Change 1: ...
- Change 2: ...
- Change 3: ...

## 🧪 Testing / Pengujian

Jelaskan testing yang sudah dilakukan:

### Manual Testing

- [ ] Tested on Windows (WSL2)
- [ ] Tested on Linux (Debian/Ubuntu)
- [ ] Tested on Termux (Android)
- [ ] All existing functionality works
- [ ] No new errors introduced

### Test Cases

```
Test 1: ...
Test 2: ...
Test 3: ...
```

### Test Results

```
[Paste test output atau screenshots di sini]
```

## 📸 Screenshots / Screenshots (jika applicable)

Attach screenshots untuk visual changes:

**Before:**
[Screenshot sebelum perubahan]

**After:**
[Screenshot sesudah perubahan]

## 📚 Documentation Changes

Dokumentasi apa yang sudah diupdate?

- [ ] README.md updated
- [ ] INSTALLATION.md updated
- [ ] Code comments added
- [ ] Function documentation added
- [ ] No documentation needed

## ⚠️ Breaking Changes / Perubahan yang Breaking

Ada breaking changes?

- [ ] Yes - explain below
- [ ] No

Jika yes, jelaskan impact dan migration path:

## 🔄 Backward Compatibility

- [ ] Fully backward compatible
- [ ] Minor breaking changes
- [ ] Major breaking changes

## ♿ Accessibility

- [ ] No accessibility concerns
- [ ] Accessibility impact considered
- [ ] Updated untuk accessibility standards

## 🔐 Security & Safety

Security considerations:

- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Reviewed for security issues
- [ ] Follows security guidelines
- [ ] Input validation added
- [ ] Data protection implemented

## 💾 Database Impact

Database changes?

- [ ] No database changes
- [ ] Migration script provided
- [ ] Schema updated
- [ ] Backward compatible

## ⚙️ Dependencies

Tambahan dependencies?

- [ ] No new dependencies
- [ ] New dependencies added (list below)
- [ ] Dependencies updated (list below)

**New/Updated Dependencies:**

```
- package-name: version
```

## 📊 Performance Impact

Performance considerations:

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Performance improved
- [ ] Potential performance impact (explain)

## ✍️ Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows style guidelines
- [ ] No unnecessary comments
- [ ] Functions documented
- [ ] Complex logic explained
- [ ] TODO comments addressed

## 🔍 Reviewers Feedback

Feedback dari review:

- [ ] All comments addressed
- [ ] Feedback incorporated
- [ ] Discussions resolved

## ☑️ Final Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Documentation has been updated
- [ ] Changes are compiled locally
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
- [ ] Added comments for complex logic
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Commits are meaningful & squashed
- [ ] Tested on all supporting platforms
- [ ] No sensitive data committed
- [ ] Followed CONTRIBUTING.md guidelines

## 📌 Additional Notes

Catatan tambahan atau konteks yang penting:

---

**PR Checklist Complete**: ✅ Pastikan semua diatas dipenuhi sebelum submit untuk review.

**Review Note**: Reviewers akan check mereka dalam 24-72 jam. Siap untuk memberikan feedback dan revisions!
